rationale: Re-verified scope fence at pinned SHA c92b3d26 in the bead worktree. HEAD is a single commit sitting directly on plan-approve (bbb685aa); git log shows no other bead commits. git show --name-only lists exactly internal/config/config.go and internal/config/config_test.go, matching round 1. Diff bbb685aa..c92b3d26 --stat confirms additive-only changes (95 insertions, 0 deletions) across those same two files. The amend that tightened subtest (b) of TestLoad_EmptyStringModel kept the commit count at one, as claimed. git status is clean. No scope drift introduced by the amend. Round-1 approval stands.
findings: git log --oneline confirms exactly one bead commit (c92b3d26) past plan-approve (bbb685aa)
git show --name-only c92b3d26 lists exactly internal/config/config.go and internal/config/config_test.go
